Karachi, Pakistan — Textile Accessories & Trims Export

Every garment
tells a story.
We write the details.

Taglyne is a Karachi-based manufacturer and exporter of textile accessories and trims. We supply woven labels, hang tags, care labels, patches, ribbons, elastics, and printed trims to garment brands and buyers worldwide.

Explore our range →
Woven Labels
Hang Tags
Care Labels
Custom Patches
Ribbons & Tapes
Elastics

What we make

Made to spec, built for buyers who need a single reliable supplier for all their trim and label requirements.

W

Woven Labels

Brand, size, and content labels woven to your exact colour and thread specification from our in-house production line.

H

Hang Tags

Custom cardstock tags with your branding, available with lamination, embossing, spot UV, and string or safety-pin attachment.

C

Care & D/R Labels

Printed satin and cotton care labels meeting international compliance standards, for garments and textile accessories.

P

Custom Patches

Embroidered, woven, or printed patches for caps, uniforms, and promotional branding — any shape, any size.

R

Ribbons & Printed Tapes

Satin and grosgrain ribbons, printed and plain, for packaging, branding, and garment trims.

E

Elastics

Flat and jacquard-woven elastics in standard and custom widths, branded with your logo as required.

+

Stickers & Printed Labels

Custom stickers and printed labels for retail, packaging, and garment finishing — turned around fast via our printing network.

Our story

Family craft,
export reach.

Taglyne is rooted in decades of manufacturing experience in Pakistan's garment and textile accessories industry. We have spent years building the production capability, supplier relationships, and export knowledge that international buyers need in a reliable long-term partner.

Our in-house production handles woven labels and printed tapes. For hang tags, stickers, and care labels, we work with a vetted network of printing partners — giving us the range and flexibility to move fast at any volume.

Full Range of textile accessories from one supplier
Low Minimum order quantities, set per buyer
Fast Sample turnaround via our printing network
PK Based in Karachi, exporting worldwide

How it works

From first enquiry to goods in hand — a simple, direct process with no unnecessary steps.

01

Send your brief

Share artwork, material preference, quantity, and any compliance requirements. A rough brief is enough to get started — we'll refine it with you.

02

Sample & approval

We produce a physical or digital sample quickly via our network. You approve before anything moves to full production.

03

Production run

Woven and knitted products go through our in-house production facility. Printed goods run through our trusted print partners. Either way, quality is on us.

04

Export & delivery

Packed and delivered — locally in Pakistan or shipped internationally. All documentation handled from our end so you can focus on your business.

Get in touch

Tell us what you need.

Whether it's your first sample or a recurring production order — reach out directly. We respond the same day.

Email us directly

Whether you're placing a sample order or scaling up production, we're ready to deliver. Get in touch and we'll handle the rest.
